Balls of Fury (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,886,940Details
International Box Office $8,893,086
Worldwide Box Office $41,780,026
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,893,121
Total $19,893,121

Opening Weekend:$11,352,123 (34.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:78.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,052 opening theaters/3,081 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,169,733

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 29th, 2007 (Wide) by Focus Features
Video Release: December 18th, 2007 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sex-related humor, and for language.
Running Time: 90 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos
Plot point: Child Prodigy, Death Sports, Miscellaneous Sports
Social setting: Ping Pong
Subgenre: Sports Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Spyglass Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
